title: WATER BILL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY NEWPORT CORPS WATER BILL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF rovides assistance with water bills, subject to availability of funds. 140 NE 4th Street First Floor, Family Services Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Must be resident of Toledo Hours: Wednesday-Friday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm, closed all holidays and the last week of December Email (541) 283-0655 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 265-6814 Main phone Main phone (541) 283-0655 Lt. Michele Dell'Olio Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: State ID and current copy of water bill LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Toledo SITE HOURS: TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of 4th and Avery Street, one block east of Arctic Circle. Five minute walk from the nearest bus station. Services: Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY OF HOPE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY NEWPORT CORPS
